description_long: This modern bungalow features a white exterior with a gable roof and large windows, creating a bright and airy appearance. The property includes a wooden deck with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and an outdoor dining area shaded by an umbrella. A driveway leads to a single-car garage, and the front yard is landscaped with trees and shrubs, bordered by a low stone wall. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden terrace, seamlessly connecting indoor and outdoor living spaces. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger panes facing the pool and garden for maximum natural light. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious blend with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern white bungalow with a gable roof, large windows, a wooden deck, swimming pool, and landscaped yard with trees and a driveway leading to a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, pool, deck, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the length of the wooden deck at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden terrace, pool, outdoor seating, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, deck, and the arrangement of windows and doors opening to the outdoor area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows facing the backyard
